stemHtml: A straight line is plotted on a Lambert Conformal chart between point A (N45°38.8' E009°01.3') and point B (N47°16.2' E005°05.8'). The True Track at departure from A of 303°, magnetic variation at A is 0° and magnetic variation at B is 1°W. If the standard parallels are 45° and 58°, what is the final Magnetic Track at B?
